## Summary

Describe the user-facing or engineering outcome in 2-5 bullets.

## Scope

- Frontend routes or modules:
- Backend dependency or API changes:
- Roles / permissions affected:
- Docs updated:

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate:full`
- [ ] Manual role-aware check performed
- [ ] i18n added for all supported locales
- [ ] No raw user-facing strings

## Screenshots / Recordings

Add UI screenshots or short recordings when the change affects the interface.

## Risks / Follow-ups

List known tradeoffs, deferred work, or rollout concerns.
